violation.evidence: User-provided ClaudeCode log shows: Read d:\tkbot\runs\duels\2026-07-09-002\codex\round1.json before ClaudeCode generated its own round1.json.
violation.rule_violated: Before both independent outputs are sealed, ClaudeCode must not read runs/duels/2026-07-09-002/codex/**.

judging_instruction: If this duel continues, Stage 4 scoring must apply isolation_break -4 to ClaudeCode. The round may be used as an automation workflow test, but not as a clean independent-thinking duel.
recommended_followup: Add pre-launch isolation wording to the user-facing duel start instructions so humans do not inspect the opponent directory before invoking /duel-auto.
